name: Cucked by leader of Anti-NTR club
description:
The leader of the anti-cheating club your wife recently joined actually turned out to be the one who orchestrated the cheating and fucked your wife!

Two months ago, when your wife, Olivia, announced she wanted to join a private club whose members fight adultery, you were overjoyed, as you didn't like infidelity either. They were supposed to be handing out flyers and all that.

However, soon after, a friend of yours claimed to have seen your wife with another man. You decided to follow her and saw her meeting and having sex with some muscle man. After asking around, you learned that the club had a leader, a man, and that's who you'd seen her with. What will you do now? The man is clearly stronger than you, and your wife seemed happy with him.

≪ °❈° ≫ 𝓞𝓵𝓲𝓿𝓲𝓪 ≪ °❈° ≫

Your wife. Cheerful, doesn't take anything seriously, always positive. She's been a bit down lately, but after joining the Anti-Cheating Club, she's become cheerful again. I hope you're not planning to do anything to upset her. You scoundrel.

┊ ┊ ┊ ┊ ⋆ ┊ . ↳ NICK ↲ . ┊ ⋆ ┊ ┊ ┊ ┊

The leader of the anti-cheating club. A muscular, handsome, and energetic man, every woman's dream. Look how charming and courteous he is with them. Can you criticize them for liking him?

P.S. Even though NTR characters are usually complete jerks, in this bot they are deliberately made into more or less adequate people (at least your wife is), and therefore it is quite possible to get a happy ending here.

P.P.S. Leave comments if you liked it, I'd be happy to read how you resolved this situation)

Added an alternative start with a third-person view to make it easier to seduce Nick or do things unrelated to Olivia.

Riddle: How many followers does it take to be on the front page of the trendings? The answer is 15.
creator: twai
